action.reasoning: Observation: ConvTasNet (1.2M params) after 3 epochs reaches train loss -10.86 but only val PESQ ~1.51 (test 1.836) due to bugs (missing channel dim in inputs to model/loss, only 1000 chunks/epoch, short training). Best remains 3.137 from MetricGAN+ + -25 LUFS (val~2.862 flat across postprocs). test_enhance.py and metricgan_checkpoint ready. Analysis: MetricGAN+ specifically optimizes PESQ on this dataset; beating it requires fixes (add unsqueeze(1) for (B,1,T), more chunks=10000, combine SISDR+MRSTFTLoss from auraloss, lr scheduler, 20+ epochs) or switch to HDemucs. Postproc saturated. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to use SpectralMaskEnhancement (offline from metricgan_checkpoint, like test_enhance.py) + fixed -25 LUFS norm + /tmp/enhanced for contract compliance. Run test_enhance.py to validate, then submit_eval on metricgan_checkpoint to restore best PESQ immediately. Incrementally fix train.py next for ConvTasNet/HDemucs exploration.
